title: snermcraft
description: snermcraft is a fun, create/farmer's delight centric modpack designed for my friends! it has balanced gameplay and is intended for use on a personal server.
body:
**What?**  
snermcraft is a multiplayer mod pack with a slew of quality of life mods. inspired by hermitcraft and create perfection series, it adds proximity voice, replay mod, mapping, and some tweaks & recipes to enhance the base game. it's mostly intended to be used by my friends but is available for anyone to use. it also adds lots of farmer's delight mods and integrations, as well as crafttweaker fixes to smooth out issues.

**Why?**  
you should download this project if you want to play on our server or host your own with the same functionality :D

**Warnings!**  
please don't update any mods if you want to play on the server-- it is HIGHLY dependent on versioning and it may not even launch due to to incompatibilities between mods on your client!

**Credits:**  
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/  
Aquaculture 2: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture  
Etched: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/etched
